title: Stop Thaksinomics
content:
This book was ceased by the police (claiming that it's against the law to distribute materials w/o indicating the publisher).

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/stop_thaksinomics.png!

Now the book is "online":http://www.bangkokbiznews.com/2006/special/idea/data/stop.pdf.
